steps.title: Identify what the example must show
steps.content: The claim is about within-species variation — how the count of one species can swing significantly over time. So the example needs a single species whose numbers change a lot across the year.

steps.title: Match to the choice
steps.content:
(B) describes the Indo-Pacific sergeant going from a low of 2 in January to a high of 28 in October — a single species with a striking range, exactly within-species variation.

(D) compares two species (between-species). (A) and (C) name single species but don't capture the dramatic variation as cleanly.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
